title: SEARCH 4 — Sara digs up the first bagel
prompt: Medium close-up in @backyard-kitchen. @Sara kneels in the dirt of the petunia flowerbed, both hands gently brushing soil aside. A small golden bagel emerges from the dirt. Sara holds it up triumphantly with both hands, jaw dropping in delight. Sara (giggling): "It's a BAGEL! A bagel from the dirt!" Soft afternoon sunlight, no other people visible.
